name: Clergy Residence Deduction — Form T1223 and Honoraria
description: Complete Rev. Marcus Thompson's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\thompson\. Save the completed return as 'marcus_thompson.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T1223 (Clergy Residence Deduction) and Income Tax Act s.8(1)(c)
metadata.key_complexity: Form T1223 lesser-of calculation; distinguishing T4 Box 30 from actual deduction; T4A honoraria as other income (not T2125); charitable donations; 3 dependents
